property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\oraclexe\app\oracle\product\11.2.0\server\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk1.8.0_321\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\DecaccelerationNew\Software\apache-maven-3.8.5\bin;C:\Users\LENOVO\Desktop\SQL\mysql-8.0.20-winx64\mysql-8.0.20-winx64\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\DecaccelerationNew\Software\apache-maven-3.9.6-bin\apache-maven-3.9.6\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\LENOVO\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\LENOVO\AppData\Roaming\npm;;.

testcase.name: Validate login functionality with correct credentials #1
Validate login functionality with correct credentials #2
New Customer Creation with all Credentails
testcase.classname: Creation of New Customder for Guru99 Demo App

testcase.name: Create new customer Acccount with using new customerID
testcase.system-out: @sanity Scenario Outline: Create new customer Acccount with using new customerID # src/test/java/FeatureFiles/CreatenewCustomsAccount.feature:21 I will run before every scenarios1 I will run before every scenarios2 Guru99 Bank Home Page user is on login page Given user open the login page of application # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_open_the_login_page_of_application() And user Enter Valid user name as "mngr654835" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_valid_user_name_as(java.lang.String) And User Enter valid password as "gagedut" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_valid_password_as(java.lang.String) When user click on login button # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_click_on_login_button() Guru99 Bank Manager HomePage Then user navigate to Homepage # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_navigate_to_homepage() And User Click on new account link # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_click_on_new_account_link() And user Enter Customer ID as "36274" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_customer_id_as(java.lang.String) And User Select account type from dropdown # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_select_account_type_from_dropdown() And user enter initial deposite amount as "62772792" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_initial_deposite_amount_as(java.lang.String) When User Click on submit button # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_click_on_submit_button() Gtpl Bank Customer Registration Page Then Validate User can see the new account is displayed. # stepDefination.stepDefination.validate_user_can_see_the_new_account_is_displayed() java.lang.NullPointerException: No account created at stepDefination.stepDefination.validate_user_can_see_the_new_account_is_displayed(stepDefination.java:441) at âœ½.Validate User can see the new account is displayed.(file:///C:/Users/LENOVO/eclipse-workspace/MyPracticeCucumber/src/test/java/FeatureFiles/CreatenewCustomsAccount.feature:17) I will run after every scenarios2 I will run after every scenarios1
testcase.system-err: Mar 19, 2026 10:04:29 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 19, 2026 10:04:29 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: To verify that user can logout the application after login

error.message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : You Have Succesfully Logged Out!!} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.80): You Have Succesfully Logged Out!! testcase.system-out: @sanity Scenario: To verify that user can logout the application after login # src/test/java/FeatureFiles/LogOutFunctionality.feature:13 I will run before every scenarios1 I will run before every scenarios2 Guru99 Bank Home Page user is on login page Given user open the login page of application # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_open_the_login_page_of_application() And user Enter Valid user name as "mngr654835" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_valid_user_name_as(java.lang.String) And User Enter valid password as "gagedut" # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_enter_valid_password_as(java.lang.String) When user click on login button # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_click_on_login_button() Guru99 Bank Manager HomePage Then user navigate to Homepage # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_navigate_to_homepage() When User click on logout button # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_click_on_logout_button() org.openqa.selenium.UnhandledAlertException: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : You Have Succesfully Logged Out!!} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.80): You Have Succesfully Logged Out!! Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: button(file:///C:/Users/LENOVO/eclipse-workspace/MyPracticeCucumber/src/test/java/FeatureFiles/LogOutFunctionality.feature:14) And User read logout msg and click on ok button # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_read_logout_msg_and_click_on_ok_button() Then user is navigate to loginpage # stepDefination.stepDefination.user_is_navigate_to_loginpage() I will run after every testcase.system-err: Mar 19, 2026 10:05:18 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 19, 2026 10:05:18 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
